items.claim: Bobby Green is very accurate with his one-two striking combination.
items.quote: Bobby Green's very accurate with his one-two.

items.claim: Bobby Green's reactionary takedown attempt against Paddy Pimblett led to him being choked out.
items.quote: it was like a reactionary takedown that he shot. And that led to him ended up getting choked out, right?

items.claim: Robert Whittaker has a tendency to leak or bleed during fights.
Cavanari struggles with maintaining control on the ground.
items.quote: he kind of struggles with control a little bit.

items.claim: Felipe dos Santos caused Cavanari issues in their fight, forcing him to rely on wrestling.
items.quote: I remember Felipe dos Santos was giving this guy a little bit of issues, right? Like he would He had to wrestle against Felipe dos Santos.

items.claim: Cavanari's performance is improving with each fight.
items.quote: He's getting better each and every time that he steps into that cage.

items.claim: Royval possesses an excellent knee strike up the middle.
items.quote: Royval has an excellent knee up the middle.

items.claim: Cavanari wrestled very hard early against Charles Johnson, which caused him to get gassed.
items.quote: against Charles Johnson, Calvin Er was wrestling very hard early and that kind of led him to getting a little gassed
